summary.en: A practical library of experiments for reducing desirability, feasibility, and viability risk before teams overbuild a product or business model.
summary.zh: 一本面向商业实验的实践手册，帮助团队在过度投入之前，用实验降低需求性、可行性和可营性风险。

recommendation.en: Use this as the operating manual for Experiment Canvas and innovation metrics: it explains how to choose evidence, define pass/fail criteria, and learn fast.
recommendation.zh: 它是实验画布和创新指标的操作手册：帮助你选择证据、定义通过/失败标准，并让团队更快学习。

sources.label: David J. Bland & Alexander Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019
Strategyzer · Testing Business Ideas book page
